_comment: schema: id (string), title (string), description (string), objective { kind: 'catch'|'talk'|'walk', target (string - fish name, npc id, 'any' or biome name like 'Desert'), count (int, defaults 1) }, reward { valu (u64) }. quests auto-start. on completion, valu is granted and the quest is marked done.

title: First Cast
description: Catch any common carp. They're forgiving.

title: Fill the Basket
description: Catch three bluegill for the inn's cook.

title: Stretch Your Legs
description: Take a long walk - 200 steps in any direction.

title: Desert Trek
description: Walk 80 steps through the Desert biome.

_comment: DIMENSION TUTORIAL QUESTS. Each is given by a thematically-named NPC who hints at the dimension's unlock mechanic.

title: Borin's Shaft
description: Borin lost the way down. Find a mineshaft entrance somewhere in the world - a wooden A-frame against a big rock - and press f at the opening. Step into the dark. The world has cousins beneath it.

title: Dante's Descent
description: Dante says the village wells run deeper than well water. Cast a line into any well a hundred times. On the hundredth, the bottom will open. He hasn't been back, but he says it was worth it.

title: Nereus' Invitation
description: Nereus stands at the pier's end and watches the horizon. He will row you to the deep - but only after a thousand fish on your line. Atlantis is real; the Five Elders do not entertain dilettantes.
